## Word / Phrase


## Problem

- [ ] Missing Chinese meaning
- [ ] Missing example sentence
- [ ] Missing YouGlish link
- [ ] Wrong review date
- [ ] Wrong error type
- [ ] Not imported to Notion

## Expected Record

```text
Word:
Chinese Meaning:
English Meaning:
Example Sentence:
YouGlish Link:
Error Type:
Next Review:
```

## Actual Record


## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Record matches the Notion schema.
- [ ] Review date follows spaced repetition rules.
- [ ] Pronunciation link is valid.
